requestedAction: Make the Social Media Management System staging app clickable and usable in draft mode, merge the reviewed target PR if clean, redeploy the dedicated Netlify staging-only site, and record proof.
scope: This approval allows exactly one target repo branch ag-os/social-media-interactive-draft-ui-v1, static frontend app updates for draft-mode navigation, post package expansion, calendar filtering, approval queue local UI state, weekly report copy/download, blocked-action explanations, one target PR, merge if clean, one redeploy of the existing dedicated staging-only Netlify site, and AG OS proof records. It does not authorize OAuth, social account connection, credentials, posting, scheduling, analytics API use, DMs/comments, n8n activation, paid tools, domain/DNS, custom domain, production deploy, real client private data, Lead Gen changes, AI Receptionist changes, Constitution changes, accepted lessons, or permanent memory.
revocationPath: This approval is revoked, expired, cancelled, or invalidated when the owner says stop or revoke, the expiration passes, the target repo changes outside PR #7, PR #7 head SHA changes from 87f5d13dc47daaa1eca42e13326a55c2b38813d1 before merge, target repo main SHA changes from daeb7c4f6e0aaaced7b55eb8fa50978320eff15e before staging redeploy, the Netlify site ID or site name changes, OAuth would start, credentials are required, a social account connection is requested, posting, scheduling, analytics, DMs/comments, n8n activation, paid tools, domain/DNS, custom domain, production deploy, customer data, production data, Lead Gen, AI Receptionist, Constitution, accepted lesson, or permanent memory scope appears, validation or boot check fails, target checks fail, or the action expands beyond this exact draft UI milestone.

evidence.reference: Current thread owner-approved task to make the Social Media Management System staging app clickable and usable in draft mode without live integrations.
AG OS dashboard build/check, validation, boot check, runtime tests, and target repo local checks must pass before final report.

approvalText: Owner-approved task: make the Social Media Management System staging app clickable and usable in draft mode. Allowed GitHub actions: create branch ag-os/social-media-interactive-draft-ui-v1, update app/source files, open PR, review PR, quality score, merge if clean, redeploy Netlify staging, and record proof. Do not execute OAuth, post, schedule, connect accounts, call analytics APIs, activate n8n, use credentials, use paid tools, change domain/DNS, touch Lead Gen, touch AI Receptionist, or change Constitution.
